raw_consumer_statement: Fraud dispute was filed XX/XX/XXXX XXXX called for more information on XX/XX/XXXX Fraud dispute denied XX/XX/XXXX Called company XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX  cat to appeal and request and ask for supporting evidence on their decision to which I was belittled and laughed at what supporting documents supporting documents of cards having chips hahahah ) essentially being denied any evidence other then the physical card was used therefore its not fraud.
